nodes.name: Sheppardia
nodes.summary: Sheppardia（Sheppardia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10种鸟类，如Grey-winged robin-chat、Bocage's akalat、Lowland akalat等10种鸟类。

nodes.name: Gabela akalat
nodes.summary: Gabela akalat（Sheppardia gabela）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Gabela akalat。

nodes.name: Gabela akalat
nodes.summary: The Gabela akalat (Sheppardia gabela) is a species of bird in the family Muscicapidae. It is endemic to Angola. The name is in part derived from the town where they were first observed, Gabela. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. It is threatened by habitat loss. References
nodes.shortSummary: The Gabela akalat (Sheppardia gabela) is a species of bird in the family Muscicapidae. It is endemic to Angola.
